final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset)
            q <= 16'b0;  // Synchronous reset
        else
            q <= d;  // Load data
    end

endmodule
